findings: CI runs bash syntax checks and ShellCheck for bin/*.sh and install.sh, plus a minimal frontmatter first-line check and install.sh smoke execution.
No metaswarm execution or validation: CI never runs a real run, commander/worker flows, queue/IPC, telemetry artifacts, monitor, or merger behavior.
Frontmatter check only verifies first line is ---; does not parse/validate YAML or ensure required keys.
Install smoke step uses sed replacement to skip demo; fragile if install.sh exec line format changes; writes to /tmp.
Changelog order check does not assert any versions exist; could trivially pass if empty.
